hyperedges.label: Pipeline Orchestration Flow
hyperedges.description: The pipeline orchestrates the ASR→LLM flow: receives audio bytes, calls ASR to transcribe, then applies LLM tasks using prompt templates

nodes.label: Submit an audio file for processing. Returns task_id immediately.
nodes.norm_label: submit an audio file for processing. returns task_id immediately.

nodes.label: Retry a failed task that has an order_id — re-query iFlytek and recover.
nodes.norm_label: retry a failed task that has an order_id — re-query iflytek and recover.

nodes.label: Re-run LLM analysis on an already-transcribed task.
nodes.norm_label: re-run llm analysis on an already-transcribed task.

nodes.label: Return task statistics for the homepage.
nodes.norm_label: return task statistics for the homepage.

nodes.label: Background: upload → poll ASR → run LLM tasks → save results.
nodes.norm_label: background: upload → poll asr → run llm tasks → save results.

nodes.label: Background: re-query iFlytek for a previously timed-out task and recover.
nodes.norm_label: background: re-query iflytek for a previously timed-out task and recover.

nodes.label: Background: re-run LLM analysis on existing transcription.
nodes.norm_label: background: re-run llm analysis on existing transcription.

nodes.norm_label: query result for an orderid. returns dict with status and data.

nodes.label: Upload and poll until done (blocking). For backward compatibility.
nodes.norm_label: upload and poll until done (blocking). for backward compatibility.

nodes.norm_label: get a configuration profile by id.
